name: brick-adjudicator
description: BRICK MODE Phase-1 prototype: focus-task-aware allow/block adjudicator (Ledger active project + Claude Haiku 4.5). No daemon, no enforcement — pure validation of the novel core.

scripts.eval:corrections: npm run build && node scripts/export-cases.mjs .data/corrections.cases.json && tsx src/eval.ts .data/corrections.cases.json
